channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Whales are showing up in San Francisco Bay. New ship alerts could help protect them
item.description: Climate change is driving whales into San Francisco Bay, where ship strikes have been deadly. A new camera system could help ships and ferries avoid collisions.

item.title: In speech to Spanish parliament, pope demands respect for the dignity of all people
item.description: In the first papal address to the Spanish legislature, the American pope called for a 'moral renewal' in legislatures and public life to ensure respect for human dignity.

item.title: Could a vibrating belt help prevent bone density loss?
item.description: Over 40 million U.S. adults aged 50+ have low bone density. An FDA-approved wearable vibration device offers a potential solution.

item.title: The red state, blue state divide is real, but driven by more than politics
item.description: New research shows 'ideological sorting' involves more than moving for political alignment; it's often one of many factors.
